data.title: Monolithic Frontend
data.description: Uses a single-page application model for efficient client-side routing and rendering.
data.technical_spec: React.js framework integrated with server-side rendering.

data.title: Microservices Backend
data.description: Spans across hundreds of individual microservices handling various functionalities.
data.technical_spec: Deployed on a Kubernetes platform with Docker containers.

data.title: Global CDN Network
data.description: Content is delivered through a globally distributed network to reduce latency.
data.technical_spec: Hosted on Google Cloud’s CDN infrastructure with multiple nodes.

data.title: Data Replication
data.description: Utilizes data replication for redundancy and high availability.
data.technical_spec: Relational and NoSQL databases with synchronous replication mechanisms.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Centralized entry-point for microservices traffic, providing load balancing and API management.
data.technical_spec: Implemented using Envoy for service mesh capabilities.
